title: Narendra Modi becomes prime minister of India
fact: Narendra Damodardas Modi is an Indian politician who has served as the prime minister of India since 2014.

title: Morarji Desai becomes prime minister of India
fact: Morarji Ranchhodji Desai was an Indian politician and independence activist who served as the prime minister of India between 1977 and 1979 leading the government formed by the Janata Party.

title: Indira Gandhi becomes prime minister of India
fact: Indira Priyadarshini Gandhi was an Indian stateswoman who served as the prime minister of India from 1966 to 1977 and again from 1980 until her assassination in 1984.

title: Jawaharlal Nehru becomes prime minister of India
fact: Jawaharlal Nehru was an Indian anti-colonial nationalist, secular humanist, social democrat, and statesman who was a central figure in India during the middle of the 20th century.

title: Rajiv Gandhi becomes prime minister of India
fact: Rajiv Ratna Gandhi was an Indian politician and pilot who served as the prime minister of India from 1984 to 1989 for two terms.

title: Atal Bihari Vajpayee becomes prime minister of India
fact: Atal Bihari Vajpayee was an Indian poet, writer and statesman who served as the prime minister of India, first for a term of 13 days in 1996, then for 6 years from 1998 to 2004.

title: Manmohan Singh becomes prime minister of India
fact: Manmohan Singh was an Indian economist, bureaucrat, academician and statesman who served as the prime minister of India from 2004 to 2014.

title: P. V. Narasimha Rao becomes prime minister of India
fact: Pamulaparthi Venkata Narasimha Rao was an Indian independence activist, lawyer, and statesman from the Indian National Congress who served as the prime minister of India from 1991 to 1996.

title: Lal Bahadur Shastri becomes prime minister of India
fact: Lal Bahadur Shastri was an Indian politician and statesman who served as the prime minister of India from 1964 to 1966.

title: Inder Kumar Gujral becomes prime minister of India
fact: Inder Kumar Gujral was an Indian diplomat, politician, and anti-colonial independence activist, who served as prime minister of India from April 1997 to March 1998.

title: V. P. Singh becomes prime minister of India
fact: Vishwanath Pratap Singh was an Indian politician who served as the Prime Minister of India from 1989 to 1990 and the Raja Bahadur of Manda.

title: Charan Singh becomes prime minister of India
fact: Chaudhary Charan Singh was an Indian politician, peasant leader, author and an independence activist who briefly served as the prime minister of India from July 1979 to January 1980.

title: Chandra Shekhar becomes prime minister of India
fact: Chandra Shekhar, also known as Jananayak, was an Indian politician and the prime minister of India, between 10 November 1990 and 21 June 1991.

title: Gulzarilal Nanda becomes prime minister of India
fact: Gulzarilal Nanda was an Indian politician and economist who specialised in labour issues.
